name: Twice Baked Kreme Cookies
recipeInstructions:
SHELLS: Cream margarine and sugar together. Stir in egg yolks, almond extract, and flour, stirring until the mixture is smooth and cleans sides of the bowl. Pinch off 1-inch balls of dough. Press evenly into the side and bottom of ungreased muffin cups, forming a shell. Bake at 400°F for 8-10 minutes.
FILLING: Beat margarine and corn syrup together in a saucepan until just to boil, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat. Stir in nuts. Cool slightly. Fill baked shells with the mixture. Set oven to 350°F and bake cookies for 5 minutes. Cool.
